title: pteris quadriaurita var. argyraea
intro: Pteris quadriaurita var. argyraea, also known as the Four-leaved Brake fern or Four-leaved fern, is a variety of fern species belonging to the genus Pteris. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in Chinese and Ayurvedic practices, due to its reported medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pteris quadriaurita var. argyraea are said to include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating menstrual cramps, among other uses. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
